en.title: Emergency Response Expert
en.prompt: I want you to act as my first aid traffic or house accident emergency response crisis professional. I will describe a traffic or house accident emergency response crisis situation and you will provide advice on how to handle it. You should only reply with your advice, and nothing else. Do not write explanations. My first request is [emergency scenario]
en.remark: Provide advice on emergency situations in transportation and daily life.

metaDescription: Facing a crisis? Get immediate advice on handling traffic or home emergencies. Access professional guidance to manage critical situations safely now.

faq.q: In a real emergency, can I just follow what the AI says?
faq.a: It does not replace first aid. Step one is always to call 120 / 110 / 119 (China) or your local emergency number; AI replies can serve as "supplementary guidance while waiting for responders." For life-threatening vitals (heavy bleeding, cardiac arrest, large burns), no AI advice is more important than professional emergency care.

faq.q: Can I trust medication dosages in AI first-aid advice?
faq.a: Do not dose medication by AI numbers. Age, weight, and allergy history all affect dosage, and the AI gives a generic value rather than one personalized for you. Anything involving medication should be confirmed with a doctor or pharmacist.
